description: A customer returned damaged goods. After customer service approves the return, accounting needs to issue a credit memo to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Receive the approved Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) from the customer service department.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the RMA, which specifies the customer, original invoice, and value of the returned goods.

nodes.task_description: Create a credit memo in the ERP system for the value of the returned goods.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates the credit memo, referencing the original invoice.

nodes.task_description: Apply the credit memo to the customer's open balance and send a copy to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent applies the credit, reduces the customer's balance, and emails them the credit memo.
